prompt: post-op check-ins with escalation to our practice inbox
notes: Identity (#10): releasing to real patients is a clinical act. ms-rivera (staff, same tenant meridian) shares the practice view of the app, but promoting a GREEN app answers 403 + auth.role_denied with the denied principal as actor — and the same green gate then promotes for dr-osei with an attestation binding the authenticated principal id and the frozen report digest, proving the 403 was the role, not the app.
